allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add server alerting system with CPU/RAM/offline monitoring

- Add database models: ServerAlertSettings \(global thresholds\),
  ServerAlertConfig \(per-server toggle\), ServerAlert \(active/resolved\)
- Add scheduler that checks thresholds every 60s and auto-resolves
- Send SMS/email on first alert, repeat every 30 min until resolved
- Add Alerts page with list view and Resolve button
- Add Server Alerts tab in Settings for global thresholds
- Add alerting toggle in server edit form
- Add alerts widget on Dashboard showing active count by type
- Add Alerts nav item with bell icon

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
